top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.bond_type
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE a1.element = 'C' OR a2.element = 'C';

SELECT DISTINCT bond_type
FROM bond
JOIN connected ON bond.bond_id = connected.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON connected.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON connected.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE a1.element = 'C' OR a2.element = 'C';

SELECT DISTINCT b.bond_type
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE a1.element = 'C' OR a2.element = 'C';

SELECT DISTINCT bond_type
FROM bond
WHERE bond_id IN (
    SELECT c.bond_id
    FROM connected c
    JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id OR c.atom_id2 = a.atom_id
    WHERE a.element = 'C'
);

SELECT DISTINCT b.bond_type
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id OR c.atom_id2 = a.atom_id
WHERE a.element = 'C';

SELECT DISTINCT b.bond_type
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE a1.element = 'C' OR a2.element = 'C';

SELECT DISTINCT bond_type
FROM bond
WHERE bond_id IN (
    SELECT c.bond_id
    FROM connected c
    JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id OR c.atom_id2 = a.atom_id
    WHERE a.element = 'C'
);

SELECT DISTINCT b.bond_type
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a ON c.atom_id = a.atom_id OR c.atom_id2 = a.atom_id
WHERE a.element = 'C';

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT b.bond_type
FROM bond b
JOIN connected c ON b.bond_id = c.bond_id
JOIN atom a1 ON c.atom_id = a1.atom_id
JOIN atom a2 ON c.atom_id2 = a2.atom_id
WHERE a1.element = 'C' OR a2.element = 'C';
